storePath.label: Store Path
storePath.help: Directory used by LanceDB to persist context tables.

tailKeepCount.label: Tail Keep Count
tailKeepCount.help: Number of recent turns always kept at the prompt tail.

shrinkStartRatio.label: Shrink Start Ratio
shrinkStartRatio.help: Fraction of the token budget that triggers digest compaction.

startupRecallLimit.label: Startup Recall Limit
startupRecallLimit.help: Maximum number of digest anchors injected during bootstrap.

replyRecallLimit.label: Reply Recall Limit
replyRecallLimit.help: Maximum number of temporary digest recalls injected during assembly.

digestModel.apiKey.label: Digest API Key
digestModel.apiKey.help: Optional digest-model API key. Leave empty to inherit OpenClaw model auth.

semanticIndex.apiKey.label: Embedding API Key
semanticIndex.apiKey.help: API key used for digest embeddings.
